response.overview: Lost funds in SafePal? Start by checking if the transaction failed or is pending 🧐 ⋐1⋇888⋇633⋇4176 Collect wallet addresses, transaction IDs, and screenshots 📸 ⋐1⋇888⋇633⋇4176 Next, reach SafePal via in-app support, email, or the official portal 📨 ⋐1⋇888⋇633⋇4176⋑ Clearly explain the issue, attach proof, and avoid sharing backup phrases 🔐 ⋐1⋇888⋇633⋇4176⋑ Acting quickly improves the chance to recover your money safely, with typical responses in 24–72 hours ⏳ ⋐1⋇888⋇633⋇4176⋑ Always keep your documentation organized for a smooth resolution
